criterion_source: C6 § 7 has no pilot for Ins/Dat. Agent-proxy / deprel limits are honesty notes, not kill thresholds.
blocking_note: H1612 freeze probe: C6 programme kill-gate MISSING for SG-SE-003 (sem-a-instrumental / sem-a-dative-experiencer; not a § 7 pilot). C6 § 7 has no pilot for Ins/Dat. Agent-proxy / deprel limits are honesty notes, not kill thresholds. Integrity re-derive against pin 04e0778: PASS. Not inventing a threshold; leave disposition=unknown. Path to freeze exit: programme adds a named gate, or human visa→published outside the probe-first kill path.
